steps.expected: Period-specific FIFO/LIFO/Weighted Average methods are resolved and enforced for inventory movements.
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 5, Failures: 0, Errors: 0. Includes FIFO oldest-batch consumption, LIFO newest-batch consumption, and weighted-average behavior after period change.

steps.action: Inspect period update coverage in accounting period tests.
steps.expected: Period API/service can persist requested costing method per period.
steps.observed: `AccountingPeriodServiceTest` covers create/update period with explicit costing method and default behavior when omitted.

steps.action: Run GST and tax reconciliation tests: `mvn --settings /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/erp-domain/.mvn/settings.xml -f /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/erp-domain/pom.xml test -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=GstServiceTest,TaxServiceTest`
steps.expected: Intra-state applies CGST+SGST; inter-state applies IGST; GST return/reconciliation values are computed correctly.
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 16, Failures: 0, Errors: 0. `GstServiceTest` validates intra/inter-state split, and `TaxServiceTest` validates GST return plus component reconciliation summaries.

steps.action: Run accounting settlement coverage set: `mvn --settings /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/erp-domain/.mvn/settings.xml -f /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/erp-domain/pom.xml test -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=AccountingServiceTest,AccountingPeriodServiceTest,ReconciliationServiceTest,AccountingComplianceAuditServiceTest,AuditTrailQueryServiceTest`
steps.expected: Single auto-settlement request allocates against oldest open invoices/purchases (FIFO) and returns settlement/journal-linked response.
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 151, Failures: 0, Errors: 0. `autoSettleDealer_allocatesOldestOutstandingInvoicesInFifoOrder` and `autoSettleSupplier_allocatesOldestOutstandingPurchasesInFifoOrder` pass with expected FIFO allocation order and applied totals.

evidence.output: AccountingServiceTest run in suite with zero failures; FIFO auto-settlement tests passed

steps.action: Use targeted service/runtime and gate-fast truthsuite evidence.
steps.expected: Close enforces checklist gates (trial balance/unposted/reconciliation), snapshot handling is correct, reopen works with audit-safe reverse flow, and close/reopen endpoints require accounting/admin authority.
steps.observed: `AccountingPeriodServiceTest` passes for close/reopen cycle, unresolved checks, and trial-balance rejection; `TS_RuntimeAccountingPeriodServiceRegressionExecutableCoverageTest` passes for close->reopen regression; gate-fast includes period-close truthsuite checks; controller close/reopen endpoints are protected with `@PreAuthorize(hasAnyAuthority('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_ACCOUNTING'))`.

evidence.output: AccountingPeriodServiceTest included in passing 151-test suite; TS_RuntimeAccountingPeriodServiceRegressionExecutableCoverageTest: 2/2 pass; gate-fast: Tests run 378, Failures 0, Errors 0

steps.action: Run accounting audit coverage set (included in focused 151-test run).
steps.expected: Audit entries are emitted for journal creation/reversal/settlement-classified flows with metadata, and audit trail can be queried with filters.
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS in focused suite. `AccountingComplianceAuditServiceTest` validates manual journal, settlement journal classification, reversal, costing/period/account actions. `AuditTrailQueryServiceTest` validates filtered and paginated audit retrieval.

assertions.title: Reconciliation service

steps.action: Run reconciliation tests (included in focused accounting suite).
steps.expected: Bank, subledger-to-GL, and inter-company reconciliation flows all validated with matched/unmatched discrepancy reporting.
steps.observed: `ReconciliationServiceTest` passes for AR subledger reconciliation, bank reconciliation, and combined subledger report; no inter-company reconciliation test case exists in targeted accounting test surface.

steps.action: Inspect reconciliation service implementation and test corpus for inter-company flow.
steps.expected: Inter-company reconciliation method/coverage exists alongside bank and subledger flows.
steps.observed: `ReconciliationService` exposes AR/AP/bank/subledger methods only; grep for intercompany/inter-company in accounting reconciliation service/tests returns no matches.

commands: grep/read inspection via tooling: ReconciliationService.java and reconciliation test classes for inter-company coverage
evidence.output: ReconciliationServiceTest: 3/3 pass for AR/AP+bank/subledger only; inter-company reconciliation coverage absent

assertions.issues: Assigned contract text requires inter-company reconciliation flow; current executable evidence covers bank and subledger reconciliation but not inter-company reconciliation behavior.

frictions.description: Targeted Maven runs recompiled the full test set (372 test sources) each time, causing substantial execution overhead for focused assertion validation.
frictions.resolution: Grouped related assertions into combined focused runs and reused gate-fast output to minimize extra executions while preserving assertion-specific evidence.

frictions.description: Integration bootstrap for InventoryAdjustmentCostingMethodTest emitted a Hibernate DDL warning (`column "payload" cannot be cast automatically to type oid`) during schema update logging.
frictions.resolution: Confirmed via surefire summary that targeted tests still completed successfully (5/5 pass) and used explicit test-result counters as the authoritative signal.

summary: Validated 6 assigned accounting-core assertions for flow A using API-surface executable evidence (focused Maven tests + code/read verification): 5 passed (VAL-ACCT-003/004/005/006/007) and 1 failed (VAL-ACCT-008, missing inter-company reconciliation evidence/implementation in current accounting reconciliation surface).
